description: Fol. 2v: Legal document in Arabic script. Abū ʿAlī Ḥasan b. Khalaf, a Jew from Tyre, renounces all of his monetary claims against Isḥaq b. Sahl b. Bishr b. Nāḥūm and Abū Naṣr. Dating: 12th century CE. Fol. 1r: Arabic document of lease (needs further examination). On fols. 1v–2r and margins, there is a medical text dealing with parts of the human body. (Information from Khan and CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
